title: Foster Gwin Gallery Reviews
content: Read honest reviews of the Foster Gwin Gallery to find out about experiences and insights on this San Francisco art location.

title: Foster Gwin Gallery | Downtown San Francisco
content: Foster Gwin Gallery | Downtown San Francisco. # Foster Gwin Gallery. ## Details. Foster Gwin Gallery is located in San Francisco’s historic Jackson Square neighborhood at the foot of the Transamerica Pyramid. ### Our Focus. Specializing in San Francisco Bay Area Contemporary Art, Foster Gwin offers a very carefully selected collection of Bay Area Abstract Expressionist and Figurative Painting from 1945 to 1975. The paintings we buy and exhibit are carefully chosen. We are a secondary market dealer and as such do not seek a quantity of an artists work but instead search diligently to buy only the top examples of any particular artist. We have the largest variety of major post war SF Abstract Artists in any present gallery. ## What's Nearby. There's so much more to experience in Downtown SF! ### Restaurants. Tricolore Caffè & Pizzeria and Catering. ### Shopping. Joe Hamer Salon San Francisco. ### Parking. 475 Sansome Street Parking Garage. 550 California Street Parking Garage.
